text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's New Year's, and I'm in my office.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Aha! I knew it. I saw the light on, so I figured
you'd be here...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, Happy New Year. May the new year
bring you peace, joy, happiness... and all that.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Come on, it's just the standard New Year's
greeting. Don't get so worked up.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, and here.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
A New Year's card. You're my trainer, after all.
Thanks for all you do and stuff.
choice_data_list: Whoa... you wrote a card and everything!
Whoa... you wrote a card and everything!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What are you getting so excited about? This is
pretty standard, you know?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, whatever. That's it for the pleasantries. Now
let's get to work.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I want to take on the Classics this year, so we
can't afford to slack off.
choice_data_list: We need to come up with a strategy.
You can't skimp on rest, either.
We'll have to collect a lot of data.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Exactly.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
After I'm finished with training, let's start scoping
out the competition.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, the year's only just started and there's
already so much to do. I really can't afford to
slouch around!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The year has barely begun, but Daiwa Scarlet and
I have already started preparing for her next race.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Well, obviously.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not going to rest just for the sake of it,
you know?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Good grief... That was a rhetorical question.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We stay careful of Daiwa Scarlet's physical
condition during her first training session of the
year.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, so you're just as fired up as I am.
Wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Then let's not dawdle. It's time to get right back
to running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We spend some time at the track, where Daiwa
Scarlet does sprints with a satisfied grin on her
face.
